framework.name: Stripe Agentic Commerce Suite — Broad Distribution Play
framework.description: Stripe co-developed ACP, powers ChatGPT checkout, launched Agentic Commerce Suite (Dec 2025) via Wix, WooCommerce, BigCommerce, Squarespace, commercetools, Akeneo. Early adopters: URBN, Etsy, Coach, Kate Spade, Ashley Furniture, Revolve.
framework.raw_quote: Stripe launched the Agentic Commerce Suite — a turnkey solution rolling out via Wix, WooCommerce, BigCommerce, Squarespace, commercetools, Akeneo, and more.

source.title: The Agentic Commerce Landscape: Who's Building What in 2026
